name: dalfox
description: Fast, powerful parameter-analysis-based XSS scanner written in Go. Tool: https://github.com/hahwul/dalfox. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #44 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map dalfox output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved dalfox output file to parse instead of running it live.
